raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Home delivery of goods has increased all across the nation due to the COVID-19 crisis.",
    "Seniors and disabled Californians rely on package delivery for fundamental items such as medication and food.",
    "Package theft is increasing with the rise of home delivery services.",
    "Current law treats package theft from porches as a misdemeanor, regardless of the number of repeat convictions.",
    "Senate Bill 358 would allow prosecutors to charge habitual offenders of porch piracy with a felony on their third or subsequent conviction within a 36-month period.",
    "The current legal treatment of porch theft leads to habitual offenders dodging real punishment for their crimes.",
    "Porch piracy increases the cost for consumers and leaves vulnerable community members without essential items."
  ]
}
```
